data.name: BadRequest_Title
data.value: Bad Request

data.name: BadRequest_Description
data.value: We couldn't make sense of that one. Double-check and try again?

data.name: BadRequest_Hint
data.value: The request was malformed or missing something important.

data.name: Unauthorized_Title
data.value: Who Goes There?

data.name: Unauthorized_Description
data.value: You need to sign in before we can let you through.

data.name: Unauthorized_Hint
data.value: Try signing in or refreshing your session.

data.name: Forbidden_Title
data.value: Off Limits

data.name: Forbidden_Description
data.value: This area is reserved. You don't have the right permissions.

data.name: Forbidden_Hint
data.value: If you think this is a mistake, contact the document owner.

data.name: NotFound_Title
data.value: Lost in Space

data.name: NotFound_Description
data.value: We looked everywhere, but this page is playing hide and seek.

data.name: NotFound_Hint
data.value: Maybe it was moved, renamed, or it never existed in the first place.

data.name: InternalError_Title
data.value: Oops, We Broke Something

data.name: InternalError_Description
data.value: Our hamsters stopped running. We're getting them back on the wheel.

data.name: InternalError_Hint
data.value: Our team has been notified. Try again in a moment.

data.name: BadGateway_Title
data.value: Bad Gateway

data.name: BadGateway_Description
data.value: We asked an upstream server for help and got nonsense back.

data.name: BadGateway_Hint
data.value: This usually resolves on its own. Give it a minute.

data.name: ServiceUnavailable_Title
data.value: Taking a Breather

data.name: ServiceUnavailable_Description
data.value: We're doing some maintenance to make things even better.

data.name: ServiceUnavailable_Hint
data.value: We'll be back before you can finish your coffee.

data.name: Default_Title
data.value: Something Went Wrong

data.name: Default_Description
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. That's all we know.

data.name: Default_Hint
data.value: Try going back or returning home.

data.name: Button_GoBack
data.value: Go Back

data.name: Button_BackToReview
data.value: Back to Review

data.name: Button_TakeMeHome
data.value: Take Me Home

data.name: RetryingIn
data.value: Retrying in
